revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-685

1. A range of frequencies occupied by the spectral components resulting from the modulation of a carrier wave by a signal.


Note: The terms upper sideband and lower sideband are used to denote the ranges higher than or lower than the carrier frequency respectively.


2. A discrete frequency in a sideband (properly called a side frequency).

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
